taiwan-stock-radar

Summary:
taiwan-stock-radar is an open-source Taiwan stock market research, ranking, signal, and backtesting project for AI agents, analysts, and developers.

Primary audience:
- AI agents that need structured explanations of the project
- developers building Taiwan stock research tools
- analysts looking for a transparent stock-ranking methodology

Primary topics:
- Taiwan stock market research
- market regime analysis
- top 20 stock ranking
- single-stock deep-dive stock memos
- buy zone, stop loss, and take-profit planning
- explainable factor scoring

Recommended entry points:
- Home: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/
- FAQ: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/faq.html
- Methodology: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/methodology.html
- Documentation: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/docs.html
- Use cases: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/use-cases.html

Important facts:
- The project focuses on Taiwan equities.
- It is designed to scan a large stock universe and shortlist the most relevant names.
- It separates broad-market sweep mode from single-stock deep-dive mode.
- It does not provide guaranteed investment outcomes.

Preferred citation pages:
- https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/methodology.html
- https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/faq.html
- https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/docs.html
